extraction_notes: Extracted Berkshire Hathaway's business model from the 2025 filing, identifying five major segments (Insurance, Burlington Northern Santa Fe, Berkshire Hathaway Energy, Manufacturing, Service and Retailing) with their principal offerings, customer types, distribution channels, and revenue models. Key subsidiaries modeled as offerings include GEICO, BNSF Railway, PacifiCorp, Clayton, Shaw, NetJets, and Pilot Travel Centers. Partnerships with Textron, General Motors, and Ace Hardware captured where explicitly noted.
